Core Features

Everything You Need, All in One Place

From student admissions to financial reporting, Ease Academy provides a complete suite of tools to manage your institution efficiently.

Student Management
Complete student lifecycle from admission to graduation
  • Admissions
  • Attendance
  • Progress Tracking
  • Report Cards
Academic Management
Streamline curriculum, timetable, and grading
  • Timetable
  • Assignments
  • Exams
  • Grading
Fee Management
Automated fee collection and financial reporting
  • Fee Collection
  • Invoices
  • Expenses
  • Reports
Communication Hub
Connect teachers, students, and parents
  • Messages
  • Notices
  • Announcements
  • Alerts
Resource Management
Manage school resources and inventory
  • Library
  • Inventory
  • Classrooms
  • Transport
Analytics Dashboard
Data-driven insights for decision making
  • Reports
  • Analytics
  • Forecasting
  • KPIs

Why Choose Ease Academy?

Built with schools in mind, designed for the future

Multi-Branch Ready

Manage multiple campuses from a single dashboard

Secure & Compliant

Data encryption and privacy compliance built-in

Cloud-Based

Access from anywhere, on any device, anytime

Easy Setup

Get Started in 3 Simple Steps

Our intuitive onboarding process will have your school up and running in no time.

01

Sign Up & Configure

Create your school account and customize settings

02

Import Your Data

Upload student, teacher, and class information

03

Go Live & Train

Launch platform and train your team

Average setup time: Less than 24 hours
